name: Lean and LaTeX
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y ca-certificates curl latexmk chktex texlive-latex-extra texlive-fonts-recommended texlive-science texlive-pictures texlive-xetex && if ! command -v elan >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl -sSf https://raw.githubusercontent.com/leanprover/elan/master/elan-init.sh | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain none; fi && bash -lc 'export PATH="$HOME/.elan/bin:$PATH"; cd "LeanWithMathLib" && lake exe cache get || true'
